name: Baked Indian Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, slowly stir cornmeal into hot milk.
2. Cook over boiling water, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes.
3. Preheat oven to 300°F. Lightly grease a 2-quart baking dish (8-1/2 inches round).
4. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients, except cold milk; stir into cornmeal mixture; mix well.
5. Turn into prepared dish and pour cold milk on top, without stirring.
6. Bake, uncovered, for 2 hours, or just until set but quivery on top. Do not overbake.
7. Let stand 30 minutes before serving. Serve warm, with vanilla ice cream or light cream.
